required_caveats: Developer Log evidence is a controlled durable candidate only.
Source status must remain explicit and must not imply runtime, deployment, or production readiness.
No live corpus mutation, DB write, Code Evidence ingestion, live retrieval, live LLM, final answer generation, or chat exposure is authorised.
no_action_attestation: No evidence ingestion, corpus mutation, Code Evidence ingestion, DB write, live retrieval, live LLM use, final natural-language answer generation, chat exposure, endpoint exposure, route registration, runtime integration, deployment, or production action was performed or authorised by this dry-run.
